title: cortex.audit.<scope>.<verb>.v1 data payload
description: Shared audit payload. The combination of payload_hash and prev_hash participates in the hash-chained audit log.

event_id.description: Unique identifier for this audit event (UUID v4 or v7).

actor.description: User or service that initiated the audited action.

subject.description: What is being audited (resource id, run id, ticket id, etc.).

payload_hash.description: SHA-256(JCS(payload)) — canonical hash of the inner payload object.

prev_hash.description: SHA-256 chain hash of the previous audit row. Omitted only for the genesis row.

ts.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the audited action occurred.

runId.description: Run identifier correlating related audit events.

agentId.description: Identifier of the agent executing the action, if applicable.

payload.description: Scope-specific audit body. Per-scope schemas tighten this shape.
